The '''ISP-6 Imperial Shuttle Pod''' was a small air/space vehicle used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces.<ref name="Kenner" />

It was a single-seat vehicle with a tri-wing configuration reminiscent of the larger [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]]. It was a fast, compact transport, designed to be deployed from larger shuttles, and it was armed with two defensive [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]] for operations in combat zones. It also possessed a rear-view mirror to spot [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] fighters from behind.<ref name="Catalog">{{WebCite|url=http://theswca.com/index.php?action=disp_item&item_id=39681|text=ISP-6 Catalog Entry|work=The Star Wars Collectors Archive|archivedate=20210115233333}}</ref>

A number were also acquired by the Rebel Alliance. The [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] ''[[Shadow Raptor]]'' carried a dozen in the rear [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]]. Additionally, one of the embarked [[Kappa-class shuttle|''Kappa''-class shuttles]] carried two in its vehicle bay.<ref name="FFG" />

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:ISP.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Kenner Mini Rig ISP-6]]
The ISP-6 was a [[1983]] [[Kenner Products|Kenner]] toy "mini-rig", and was not seen in any other media.<ref name="Kenner" /> The description of it as "fast" and its role as a pod that would be deployed ''from'' shuttles, come from the [http://theswca.com/index.php?action=disp_item&item_id=39681 Kenner promotional material] quoted at The Star Wars Collectors Archive.<ref name="Catalog" />
